info.description: This is a swagger documentation for Reporter
info.title: Reporter API

get.description: Retrieves all data sources connected on plugin with all information from the database
get.summary: Get all data sources connected on reporter

get.description: Retrieves a data sources information with data source id passed

post.description: Create a Deadline with the input payload

get.description: Returns active deadlines within their notification window, sorted by urgency

delete.description: Delete a Deadline by its ID

patch.description: Update a Deadline by its ID
Mark a Deadline as delivered by its ID

get.description: Returns aggregated counts of templates, reports, data sources, and errors

parameters.description: Number of days for error period
parameters.name: errorPeriodDays

parameters.description: Created at date, YYYY-MM-DD (also accepts createdAt)
parameters.name: created_at

post.description: Create a Report of existent template with the input payload

parameters.description: Client-provided idempotency key to prevent duplicate report creation
parameters.name: X-Idempotency

X-Idempotency-Replayed.description: Set to 'true' when the response is a replay of a previously processed idempotent request

get.description: Get information of a Report passing the ID
Make a download of a Report passing the ID

post.description: Create a Template with the input payload (multipart form)

parameters.description: Client-provided idempotency key to prevent duplicate template creation
parameters.name: X-Idempotency

get.description: Returns all available block type definitions including properties and categories
get.summary: Get block definitions for template builder

get.description: Returns all available Pongo2 filter definitions including DIMP filters
get.summary: Get filter definitions for template builder

post.description: Converts a JSON block structure into Pongo2 template code and extracts mapped fields
post.summary: Generate Pongo2 code from template blocks

post.description: Validates a sequence of template blocks. Validation errors are returned in the **200 envelope** with `valid:false` and per-block error messages. HTTP **400** is reserved for malformed request bodies (JSON parse failures).

get.description: Get information of a Template passing the ID

delete.description: Delete a Template by its ID

patch.description: Update a Template by its ID (multipart form)

CreateDeadlineInput.description: CreateDeadlineInput is the input payload to create a deadline.

CreateReportInput.description: CreateReportInput is the input payload to create a report.

DataSourceDetails.description: DataSourceDetails is the data source details of database

DataSourceInformation.description: DataSourceInformation is the data source information of database connected on plugin

DeliverDeadlineInput.description: DeliverDeadlineInput is the input payload to mark a deadline as delivered or not.

Pagination.description: Pagination is the struct designed to store the pagination data of an entity list.

TableDetails.description: TableDetails is the struct of table information

TemplateResponse.description: TemplateResponse wraps a template with optional validation warnings.

UpdateDeadlineInput.description: UpdateDeadlineInput is the input payload to update a deadline.

code.description: Code is a machine-readable warning code (e.g., "DATA_SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE").

field.description: Field identifies the affected field or data source reference.

message.description: Message is a human-readable description of the warning.

between.description:
Between specifies a range condition with exactly two values [min, max].
Matches records where min <= field <= max
Example: {"between": [100, 1000]} matches records where 100 <= field <= 1000

eq.description:
Equals specifies exact value matches. Multiple values treated as OR conditions.
Example: {"eq": ["active", "pending"]} matches records where field equals "active" OR "pending"

gt.description:
GreaterThan specifies values that must be greater than the provided value.
Should contain exactly one value for comparison.
Example: {"gt": [100]} matches records where field > 100

gte.description:
GreaterOrEqual specifies values that must be greater than or equal to the provided value.
Should contain exactly one value for comparison.
Example: {"gte": ["2025-06-01"]} matches records where field >= "2025-06-01"

in.description:
In specifies a list of values where the field must match any one of them.
Multiple values treated as OR conditions.
Example: {"in": ["active", "pending", "suspended"]} matches any of these statuses

lt.description:
LessThan specifies values that must be less than the provided value.
Should contain exactly one value for comparison.
Example: {"lt": [1000]} matches records where field < 1000

lte.description:
LessOrEqual specifies values that must be less than or equal to the provided value.
Should contain exactly one value for comparison.
Example: {"lte": ["2025-06-30"]} matches records where field <= "2025-06-30"

nin.description:
NotIn specifies a list of values where the field must NOT match any of them.
Multiple values treated as AND NOT conditions.
Example: {"nin": ["deleted", "archived"]} excludes these statuses

BearerAuth.description: The authorization token in the 'Bearer access_token' format. Only required when auth plugin is enabled.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
